code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut stopped = false
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n and not stopped
  let is_end = i == n
  mut is_ws = false
  mut cur_byte = 0
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      cur_byte = b
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_end or is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(cur_byte)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
